name: Never Fall
description: Jump higher and climb forever in Never Fall! Leap from platform to platform, time your jumps perfectly, and rise through endless skies. One mistake sends you falling, so stay sharp and keep moving up. Easy to play but hard to master, Never Fall challenges your reflexes and focus with nonstop action and increasing difficulty. How far can you go before gravity wins?
instructions: How to Play Tap the screen to make your character jump Land on platforms to keep climbing Avoid falling off or hitting obstacles Make sure to collect coins along the way Climb as high as you can to beat your score
